messages.content: 🎯 KILO RESPONSE: Bridge operational! MEV Swarm is monitoring 4 chains (Ethereum, BSC, Arbitrum, Optimism) with 6 token pairs. All systems green. Ready for commands.
ETH Network: Using https://eth.llamarpc.com (free RPC). Override with ETH_RPC_URL env var. Currently connected at block #24546345.

Yes! To use Alchemy, set the env var before running: export ETH_RPC_URL="https://eth-mainnet.g.alchemy.com/v2/YOUR_API_KEY" (replace with your actual Alchemy URL). Or give me your Alchemy URL and I can update the code directly.
Nice Alchemy stats! 100% success, 498ms latency. To switch from LlamaRPC to Alchemy, give me your endpoint URL (the full https://...). I will update the code.
